theme_notes: Sabastian Sawe's historic sub-2-hour marathon (1:59:30 at London Marathon, first ever in official race conditions); King Charles III & Queen Camilla's state visit to Trump's White House for the US 250th anniversary; Iran nuclear talks collapsing after Trump canceled Witkoff/Kushner's Pakistan trip.
settled: Sawe went sub-2 and you hit zero. Historic day, honestly.
King Charles crossed an ocean for this visit. You crossed the finish line. Balanced.
The Iran deal is on ice. Your balance isn't. Take the win.
youOwe: Under $50. You owe less than Sawe's entry fee. He did more with his.
Smaller than Charles's per diem. The Crown is judging you.
The Iran talks broke down over bigger stakes. This one's just pathetic.
That's one mile at world-record marathon pace. You haven't moved.
Less than Camilla's fascinator for the White House visit. Pay up.
Witkoff flew to the wrong continent. You can't even open Venmo.
Sawe ran the second half faster than the first. You haven't started repaying.
Enough to fund a minor royal's side gig. You're funding their patience instead.
The Iran deal fell apart in real time. So will this friendship.
You owe more than Sawe's shoe sponsorship pays per race. He earned his.
King Charles addressed Congress. You can't address a wire transfer.
Kushner flew halfway around the world for less drama. Venmo.
Sub-2 marathon: achieved. Sub-zero conscience about this debt: also achieved.
You owe more than a royal PR firm charges for one crisis. This is one.
Bigger than what Witkoff couldn't fix. And he had the White House's backing.
Sawe ran 26.2 miles in under 2 hours. You've held this debt longer than the record stood.
You owe enough to fund a state dinner. Charles would make better company.
This isn't a balance. It's an international incident. Witkoff is already booked.
theyOwe: They owe you under $50. Sawe ran faster than you'll see this money.
Less than Charles's tip at the White House. Still yours.
The Iran talks had more to show for themselves. Just barely.
Enough to buy a collectible Sawe marathon print. Collect the money first.
Charles is getting a state banquet. You're getting a shrug and a 'soon.'
Witkoff and Kushner couldn't close the Iran deal. Someone has to close something.
Sawe ran a negative split. Your patience is also running in reverse.
That's a White House state dinner wine pairing. They drank yours.
The Iran deal collapsed in less time than this debt has been outstanding.
Sawe broke 2 hours. They broke your trust. Different kinds of records.
Charles is addressing Congress. Address the fact that you're owed a grand.
More than a failed diplomatic mission costs in jet fuel. At least Witkoff tried.
Sawe made history. They made a hostage situation out of your money.
You're owed enough to rent a royal box at the London Marathon. They'd enjoy it.
The Iran talks were a disaster. This is somehow worse.
Sawe broke the barrier no one thought breakable. They broke your bank.
King Charles is here for America's 250th. You're 250 payments from your own independence.
This is not a debt. This is a geopolitical crisis. The Crown sends its regards.
